word: G1532 - εἰστρέχω - eistréchō - ice-trekh'-o - Run in

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἰστρέχω

- Transliteration: Eistrecho

- Phonetic: ice-trekh'-o

- Definition:

1. to run in

- Origin: from G1519 and G5143

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1519 and G5143; to hasten inward: - run in.
